data.body: passes.pass1_chunk: the Pass-1 evidence-record finder emitting {finding, criteria[], evidence[], scenarios[], impact} with NO model severity/confidence; single-turn over facet chunks + agentic for the code-grounding tier; structured-output contract plan_review_findings. A clean chunk returns an empty list. Wired into orchestrator._run_passes (parallel chunks + per-criterion agent finders). Live-validated on ticket 6c5c (6 grounded findings).
